growth_records.cite: Jiang et al. Carbon Sources for Polyhydroxyalkanoates and an Integrated Biorefinery. International Journal of Molecular Sciences (2016). DOI:10.3390/ijms17071157. [PMC4964529]
growth_records.snippet: Methanol | M. organophilum | 250 | 52.0 | P3HB | 1.8-2.0 | 0.19 [81]... volumetric productivity reached 1.8-2.0 g P3HB/L/h, and the yield was 0.19 g/g methanol.
growth_records.notes: REVIEW secondary value (Table 2 + text, ref [81], Kim et al., K-limitation). CDW 250 g/L, 52% P3HB, 1.8-2.0 g/L/h, 0.19 g/g methanol. Methanol kept <0.5% v/v to prevent growth inhibition.
